title: Accessibility Quiz with Admin Back End
alt: A list of items in an accessibility survey
description: A survey application built for UK non-profit Sick in the City, allowing potential clients to complete a workplace accessibility quiz, with an admin back end for managing quiz content and viewing data analytics. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and MongoDB.

title: Synth App
alt: A screenshot of synth app sequencer
description: A Synthesizer/Sequencer application built with React/TypeScript, Next.js, and Tone.js, using Recoil for state management. The user can create a palette of notes and play music.

title: International Clock
alt: Two clocks, one showing New York time and the other Berlin time
description: Search and display the time at different locations. Front end built with React/Vite deployed to Amazon S3; the time zone is calculated in an AWS Lambda function built with Rust, and results are cached to the client.

title: Time Bandit
alt: A screenshot displaying a task in progress, its name, and the duration so far
description: A time management command line application for tracking time spent on various tasks, built with Rust. Tasks and their individual events are stored in an SQLite database.
